new_jobs.title: Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect.
new_jobs.category: Information Technology, Management, Supply Chain, Communication, Accounting, IT
new_jobs.description:
About Etimad Maihan group
Etimad Maihan Group is an Afghan-owned construction and engineering company with an established presence across Afghanistan, employing a team of 20 to 50 professionals across project management, engineering, civil works, and operations. Founded and led by Afghan nationals, the company has built its reputation through the successful delivery of residential, commercial, and infrastructure construction projects, working in compliance with Afghan Ministry of Urban Development and Housing standards and international quality benchmarks.
With a strong foundation in the Afghan construction sector, Etimad Maihan Group is now investing in its next strategic phase: the development of BuildPrice NSW, a technology platform being launched in Australia. BuildPrice NSW applies artificial intelligence to automate construction cost estimation — enabling clients to upload architectural drawings and receive an instant, itemised Bill of Quantities priced at current market rates. This platform is the first of its kind in the Australian construction market and represents Etimad Maihan Group's expansion from physical construction into construction technology.
The development team for BuildPrice NSW will be based in Afghanistan, working under the direct leadership of the Group's Director and reporting to the Australian operation. This arrangement reflects the Group's commitment to creating skilled technology employment in Afghanistan while delivering an internationally competitive product. Etimad Maihan Group offers its technology team members direct exposure to the Australian construction market, hands-on experience with current AI technologies including the Anthropic Claude API, and a genuine opportunity to grow with a company at the beginning of its international journey.
The Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect role is the founding technical position within this division and represents a significant career opportunity for a highly qualified Afghan software engineer.
Mandatory
• Minimum 5 years of professional full-stack software development experience, with at least 2 years in a senior or lead capacity.
• Bachelor's degree (B.Sc.) in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Information Technology, or a closely related technical discipline.
• Demonstrable experience having led or co-led the full build of a production web application — from architecture through to deployment. Portfolio or GitHub evidence required.
• Strong command of both frontend (React ecosystem) and backend (Node.js or Python) development — not a specialist in one at the expense of the other.
• Proven ability to write clean, documented, maintainable code that other developers can work with and extend.
• Professional proficiency in English — written and spoken — sufficient to communicate requirements, documentation, and technical decisions clearly with an Australian director.
Preferred
• 5+ years of experience (beyond the minimum) with increasing scope and seniority.
• Prior experience as a founding engineer or CTO equivalent at a startup or early-stage company.
• Demonstrable experience mentoring junior developers and conducting systematic code reviews.
• Experience working in an ISO 27001, SOC 2, or similar security-conscious engineering environment.

Job Descriptions
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES:
1. System Architecture & Technical Leadership
• Design and own the complete system architecture for all three platform components: customer portal, backend API, and internal ERP.
• Define technology standards, coding conventions, branching strategy, code review protocols, and deployment pipelines that all team members must follow.
• Produce and maintain architecture decision records (ADRs) for every major technical decision, including database schema design, API structure, third-party integrations, and AI pipeline design.
• Evaluate and select all third-party libraries, frameworks, SaaS tools, and cloud services — with rationale documented for each selection.
• Ensure all architectural decisions account for Australian data sovereignty, GDPR-adjacent obligations, and NCC/ABSA compliance where applicable.
2. Customer Portal (Frontend)
• Build and maintain the customer-facing web application using React 18+ and Next.js 14+ (App Router).
• Implement the drawing upload flow (PDF intake), real-time BoQ display, itemised pricing breakdown UI, scope adjustment interface, and job acceptance workflow.
• Ensure full mobile responsiveness, accessibility (WCAG 2.1 AA), and sub-3-second page load on Australian connections.
• Build the user authentication system (email/password + Google OAuth), account management, notification system, and document download (BoQ PDF export).
• Integrate the Stripe payment gateway for deposit collection upon job acceptance.
3. Backend API
• Design and implement a RESTful (and where appropriate, GraphQL) API layer using Node.js (Express or Fastify) or Python (FastAPI or Django REST Framework).
• Design the PostgreSQL database schema covering: users, projects, BoQ line items, materials, trade rates, job lifecycle, contractors, invoicing, and audit logs.
• Build the pricing engine — the core module that takes extracted BoQ line items and applies current NSW market rates, supplier pricing, and trade margin rules to produce the final quoted price.
• Implement Redis caching for high-frequency pricing lookups and session management.
• Build the webhook and event pipeline for job status updates, contractor notifications, payment confirmations, and reporting.
• Implement row-level security and role-based access control (RBAC) covering: customer, operations staff, contractor, admin, and super-admin roles.
4. AI / BoQ Automation Engine
• Design and implement the end-to-end PDF drawing ingestion pipeline — from raw PDF upload to structured BoQ output.
• Integrate the Claude API (Anthropic) for intelligent extraction of room schedules, finishes schedules, fixture schedules, and specification data from architectural drawing sets.
• Build the structured data normalisation layer that converts AI-extracted raw text into validated, schema-conformant BoQ line items.
• Implement confidence scoring, exception flagging, and human review workflows for AI outputs that fall below acceptable confidence thresholds.
• Build the feedback loop system — where corrections made by the operations team are used to continuously improve extraction accuracy over time.
• Optimise the pipeline for speed: target under 3 minutes from drawing upload to delivered BoQ for a standard residential drawing set.
5. Internal ERP (Operations Back-Office)
• Design and build the internal ERP used by the BuildPrice NSW operations team for day-to-day management of jobs, pricing, contractors, and reporting.
• Key ERP modules to deliver: Job Dashboard (all active jobs and their status), Pricing Database Manager (trade rates, material costs, supplier pricing), Contractor Management (profiles, licences, availability, performance ratings), BoQ Review & Override Interface, Financial Reporting (invoicing, GST, margin tracking), and Quality Control checklists.
• Build role-specific dashboards for: operations manager, pricing analyst, contractor coordinator, and executive/founder views.
6. Cloud Infrastructure & DevOps
• Set up and maintain the full AWS infrastructure on ap-southeast-2 (Sydney): EC2 or ECS for compute, RDS PostgreSQL for the primary database, ElastiCache Redis, S3 for drawing storage, CloudFront CDN, Route 53 DNS, ACM for SSL, and Secrets Manager for credentials.
• Build and maintain CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions: automated testing, linting, build, staging deployment, and production deployment with rollback capability.
• Implement monitoring and alerting using CloudWatch and/or Datadog: uptime monitoring, performance metrics, error alerting, and cost monitoring.
• Implement automated backups, disaster recovery procedures, and document RPO/RTO targets.
7. Team Leadership
• Once the broader Phase 1 team is assembled, lead and mentor 6 additional specialists: Frontend Developer, Backend Developer, AI/BoQ Engineer, QA/Test Engineer, DevOps Engineer, and Project Manager.
• Conduct weekly technical stand-ups (10:00 AM Kabul time.), code reviews, sprint planning, and retrospectives.
• Define and enforce code quality standards, peer review requirements, and testing coverage targets across all team members.
• Be the primary technical liaison between the development team and the Founder — translating business requirements into technical specifications, and technical constraints into business impact.

Job Requirements
REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS — MANDATORY
Candidates must demonstrate strong hands-on experience across all of the following. Applications without evidence of these skills will not be considered.
Frontend
React 18+
Next.js 14+ (App Router)
TypeScript
Tailwind CSS
REST API integration
State management (Zustand / Redux)
Responsive design
Web accessibility (WCAG)
PDF rendering in browser
Backend & Database
Node.js (Express / Fastify)
Python (FastAPI / Django)
PostgreSQL (advanced)
Database schema design
REST API design
JWT / OAuth2 / session auth
Redis (caching & queues)
File upload & storage (S3)
Background job queues
AI / Automation
Claude API / OpenAI API
PDF text extraction
Prompt engineering
Structured output (JSON schema)
Python data pipelines
pandas / openpyxl
Document parsing (PyMuPDF / pdfplumber)
Data validation & normalisation
Error handling & fallback logic
Cloud & DevOps
AWS (EC2 / RDS / S3 / CloudFront)
AWS (Route53 / ACM / IAM / VPC)
Docker & Docker Compose
GitHub Actions (CI/CD)
Linux / Bash scripting
Nginx / ALB load balancing
CloudWatch monitoring
Environment & secrets management
Terraform or CloudFormation
General Engineering
Git (branching & code review)
Agile / Scrum methodology
Unit & integration testing
Security best practices (OWASP)
API documentation (OpenAPI/Swagger)
Performance optimisation

Submission Guidelines
The Phase 1 team structure is as follows. The Tech Lead is the most senior technical person in the organisation and is accountable for all technical deliverables:
Tech Lead / Full-Stack Architect
This role — owns all architecture and technical delivery
Frontend Developer
Junior/mid — supervised by Tech Lead
Backend Developer
Junior/mid — supervised by Tech Lead
AI / BoQ Automation Engineer
Specialist — supervised by Tech Lead
QA / Test Engineer
Junior — supervised by Tech Lead
DevOps / Cloud Infrastructure
Specialist — supervised by Tech Lead
Project Manager / Product Owner
Co-ordination — reports to Founder, coordinates with Tech Lead
Customer Support & Data Entry
Operations — not technically supervised by Tech Lead

Submission Email
info@etimadmaihan.com
Apply

new_jobs.title: Graphic Designer & Digital Media Specialist
new_jobs.description:
About Ghyasi Group of companies
Ghyasi Group of Companies is a leading Afghan multi-sector conglomerate operating across logistics, pharmaceuticals, construction, trading, and humanitarian sectors. Established with a vision of excellence and sustainable growth, Ghyasi Group is committed to building strong internal systems and a professional corporate identity that reflects its national and international standing.

Job Descriptions
Ghyasi Group of Companies is seeking a creative and motivated Graphic Designer & Digital Media Specialist to join its Kabul office. The successful candidate will be responsible for designing high-quality marketing and corporate materials, producing professional photos and videos, managing the company’s social media platforms, and strengthening the organization’s visual identity across all business sectors. The ideal candidate should have strong graphic design skills, experience in digital media and content creation, and the ability to manage multiple creative projects in a professional environment.
Key Responsibilities
Graphic Design
• Design professional materials including ID cards, letterheads, banners, brochures, and company profiles
• Develop marketing materials for print and digital use across all Ghyasi Group subsidiaries
• Ensure all designs are aligned with Ghyasi Group’s brand identity and visual standards
• Prepare print-ready files and coordinate with printing vendors as needed
Video & Photo Production
• Plan, shoot, and edit professional corporate videos, promotional clips, and event coverage
• Conduct in-house photography for staff, facilities, products, and company events
• Edit and retouch photos for both digital and print use
• Maintain an organized archive of all media assets
Digital & Social Media
• Manage and grow Ghyasi Group’s presence on Facebook, Instagram, and other platforms
• Create and schedule engaging content (posts, reels, stories) on a regular basis
• Run and manage paid advertising and boost campaigns on social media platforms
• Monitor performance analytics and report on reach, engagement, and campaign results
• Gradually take on broader marketing responsibilities as the role evolves

Job Requirements
Education
• Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field
• Relevant certifications or a strong portfolio may substitute for formal degree
Experience
• Minimum 2–4 years of professional experience in graphic design and/or digital media
• Demonstrated experience in social media management and content creation
Technical Skills — Required
• Adobe Photoshop — advanced level
• Adobe Illustrator or InDesign — advanced level
• Adobe Premiere Pro or similar video editing software
• Adobe After Effects (motion graphics) — preferred
• Photography skills with DSLR or mirrorless camera
• Social media advertising — Facebook Ads Manager, Instagram Boost
• Familiarity with AI.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates should submit their CV and Portfolio (collection of past work) to:
career@ghaysigroup.com
Email Subject: Graphic Designer Application — Ghyasi Group
Closing Date: July 17, 2026
Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. Incomplete applications will not be considered.

Submission Email
career@ghaysigroup.com
Apply

details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in Graphic Design, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field. OR Relevant certifications or a strong portfolio.

new_jobs.title: Motion Graphic Designer
new_jobs.description:
About Yama Ramin Media Production & Technology (YRMPT)
Yama Ramin Media Production and Technology Company (YRMPT) is a well-established media production and technology company, officially registered with the Ministry of Commerce and Industries of Afghanistan. With a strong presence across the country, YRMPT delivers innovative media and technology solutions in collaboration with a diverse range of national and international organizations.
We work closely with leading telecom operators, as well as international NGOs, development partners, and humanitarian organizations, and various United Nations agencies. Our projects span media production, digital solutions, communication campaigns, and technology-driven services, contributing to impactful and sustainable initiatives nationwide.
At YRMPT, we value professionalism, creativity, innovation, and teamwork. We provide a dynamic working environment that encourages learning, skill development, and growth, while offering opportunities to work on high-impact projects with reputable local and international partners.
For more information about our company, services, and portfolio, please visit www.yrmpt.com .

Job Descriptions
Position Summary:
The Motion Graphic Designer will be responsible for designing and producing high-quality motion graphics, animations, video edits, and visual content for digital and broadcast platforms. The successful candidate will collaborate with the creative and production teams to transform concepts into compelling visual stories while maintaining high creative and technical standards.
Key Responsibilities
Motion Graphics & Animation
Design and produce high-quality motion graphics, 2D animations, and visual effects for commercials, social media, corporate videos, documentaries, promotional films, and awareness campaigns.
Create engaging animated content for digital marketing campaigns, presentations, websites, and multimedia projects.
Develop storyboards, style frames, and animation concepts based on project requirements.
Animate logos, titles, infographics, typography, and other visual elements.
Video Editing & Post-Production
Edit video content using industry-standard software.
Apply motion graphics, transitions, visual effects, color correction, and sound synchronization.
Collaborate with videographers, producers, and editors throughout post-production.
Ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and project deadlines.
Graphic Design
Design static visual assets, including social media graphics, branding materials, brochures, presentations, banners, and marketing collateral.
Ensure designs are consistent with client branding and project objectives.
Prepare artwork for digital and print production.
Collaboration & Project Coordination
Work closely with the creative, marketing, and production teams to understand client requirements.
Manage multiple design and animation projects simultaneously while meeting deadlines.
Incorporate feedback from clients and internal stakeholders into final deliverables.
Stay up to date with industry trends, animation techniques, and emerging creative technologies.

Job Requirements
Qualifications & Experience
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia, Animation, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field.
Minimum 3–5 years of professional experience in motion graphics, animation, graphic design, or multimedia production.
Strong portfolio demonstrating expertise in motion graphics, animation, video editing, and graphic design.
Advanced proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Blender, Cinema 4D, Premiere Pro, Photoshop, Illustrator.
Strong understanding of animation principles, typography, composition, color theory, and visual storytelling.
Ability to manage multiple projects in a fast-paced production environment.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience working in a media production company, advertising agency, or creative studio.
Knowledge of 3D animation software such as Blender or Cinema 4D.
Experience with character animation, visual effects (VFX), or UI animation is an advantage.
Familiarity with social media content creation and digital marketing trends.
Excellent communication, teamwork, and time management skills.

Submission Guidelines
Interested Afghan candidates with the required qualification and experience should submit their applications electronically through hr@yrmpt.com email. To avoid confusions, disagreement and conflicts during recruitment process all applicants are required to clearly mention position title (Motion Graphic Designer) and vacancy announcement number (YRMPT-HR-072) in the subject lines of their emails otherwise, your CV's will not be considered for this post.
Please do not submit any other supporting documentation or educational certificates with your application unless you are requested.
Only short listed candidates will be contacted for interview/written test.

Submission Email
hr@yrmpt.com
Apply

details.Education: Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Multimedia, Animation, Visual Communication, Fine Arts, or a related field.

expiring_today.title: Generative AI Training Intern (Paid)
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
As a Generative AI Training Intern, you will learn how modern AI tools and models work and help us prepare, test, and improve AI-generated content. This is a hands-on, beginner-friendly role designed to teach you real, in-demand skills while you contribute to live projects. You do not need to be an expert today — you need to be reliable, curious, a fast learner, and able to communicate clearly in English.

Duties and Responsibilities
What You Will Do
Use leading generative AI tools to create, edit, and refine high-quality content in English — for our own products, marketing, and client work.
Write, test, and improve prompts so our AI consistently produces clear, accurate, and useful results.
Review AI output for quality, checking facts, tone, grammar, and clarity before it is published or shipped.
Help build and organize the data, examples, and guidelines used to train, fine-tune, and guide our AI models.
Support the testing and improvement of our new mobile apps and products as we build them, sharing feedback from a real user’s point of view.
Collaborate closely across teams — including social media, marketing, and communications — to turn AI work into posts, campaigns, and content that reach our audience.
Take on a variety of tasks as priorities shift; in a lean, fast-moving startup, everyone wears several hats and contributes wherever they are needed most.
Keep clear records of your work and report your progress regularly so the whole team stays aligned.
Stay curious, proactive, and creative — bring ideas, learn continuously, and apply feedback to make our work better.

Job Requirements
Who We Are Looking For
Computer science background or software engineering and programming.
Age 20 or older.
Good written and spoken English (this is essential — all work is in English).
Comfortable using a computer and the internet; able to learn new tools quickly.
Interest in artificial intelligence and a willingness to learn by doing.
Reliable, honest, well-organized, and able to meet deadlines without close supervision.
A stable personal computer or laptop and a reliable internet connection.
Bonus (not required): any prior experience with AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, or similar.
What We Offer
Paid internship — a monthly stipend of $150.
Remote work within a hybrid (on-site + remote) team, on a flexible schedule of around 8 hours per day.
Real, practical experience with the latest generative AI tools and large language models.
Mentorship and direct feedback from the Sahar AI team.
A certificate of completion and a strong reference for top performers.
The opportunity for a longer-term role for outstanding interns.

Submission Guidelines
There is no separate interview for this role. Your video presentation is your interview. To apply, please send the following together in one email:
1. Your CV / résumé — in English (PDF preferred), attached to your email.
2. A link to your video presentation (5–10 minutes, recorded in English). Upload your video to Google Drive or WeTransfer and paste the shareable link in your email. Please do not attach the video file directly, and make sure the link is set so that anyone with the link can view it. 3. Important: The video presentation is required. It is your interview — there will be no further interviews. Applications without a video will not be considered.
Send both to: SaharAI.company@gmail.com also keep hr@saharai.io in CC.
Email subject line: “Generative AI Training Intern — Application”
If you have any questions about this role, contact us at info@saharai.io .
Your Video Presentation (5–10 minutes)
Please record one continuous video of yourself speaking in English. You may use a phone or a computer — a quiet room, no mask and clear sound are more important than a fancy camera. Speak naturally and answer all five questions in order, then upload the video to Google Drive or WeTransfer and send us the link (see “How to Apply” above). We use this video to understand your English, your communication, and how you would handle real work.
Answer these five questions in your video:
1. Introduction and motivation. Introduce yourself — your background and education — and explain why you want to join Sahar AI as a Generative AI Training Intern and what you hope to gain over the six months.
2. Self-directed learning. Tell us about a time you taught yourself a new tool, software, or skill. How did you approach it, and what was the result?
3. Understanding the work. In simple words, explain what a generative AI model is and describe one realistic way it could help a business, an executive, or a public figure.
4. Practical thinking. Imagine you are asked to use an AI tool to write a short, professional message for a client. Describe the instructions (the prompt) you would give the AI to get a good result, and how you would check that the answer is accurate before sending it.
5. Reliability and work style. Describe your computer and internet setup, your weekly availability, and how you stay organized and meet deadlines when you work remotely and handle more than one task at a time.
How We Will Choose
We review every complete application fairly. Shortlisted candidates will be contacted by email. We evaluate each applicant on:
Your CV and relevant background or experience.
The quality and clarity of your video presentation.
Your English proficiency — both spoken and written.
Your communication skills and professionalism.
Your practical, real-work ability and problem-solving.
We look forward to meeting you. Good luck!

expiring_today.title: Programme Monitoring Extender
expiring_today.category: Management, Planning, Business Economics, Statistics, Management Information System, Data Science, Social Science
expiring_today.description:
Role Summary
The Programme Monitoring Extender coordinates and oversees mid-year data collection activities for the Minimum Service Package (MSP) programme integration. This field-based role focuses on ensuring data integrity, tracking collection progress, and providing technical support to field teams to guarantee accurate and timely reporting.

Duties and Responsibilities
TASK TO BE PERFORMED:
· Support the planning and coordination of programme integration of MSP mid-year data collection activities.
· Conduct field visits to oversee and support data collection processes in sampled sites.
· Perform data quality checks and verification to ensure accuracy, completeness, and consistency of collected data.
· Provide on-site support to Extenders and data collectors during the process of data collection.
· Monitor progress of data collection activities and promptly report challenges, risks, and bottlenecks.
· Compile, clean, and submit monitoring data and field findings in a timely manner.
· Prepare brief progress updates and contribute to monitoring reports and presentations.
· Support analysis and reporting of programme integration minimum service package progress .
DELIVERABLE(s):
· Programme Integration Mid-Year data collection plan finalized and implemented for assigned locations/sites.
· Field monitoring visits conducted in all assigned sampled sites, with completed field monitoring reports and visit summaries submitted.
· Data quality assurance and verification completed for all collected datasets, with identified discrepancies documented and addressed.
· Technical on-site support provided to Extenders and data collectors, with issues resolved and data collection standards maintained.
· Regular progress updates submitted, including documentation of challenges, risks, bottlenecks, and recommended corrective actions.
· Cleaned, validated, and consolidated monitoring datasets submitted in accordance with agreed timelines and reporting requirements.
Analysis of programme integration minimum service package (MSP) monitoring data completed, with key findings, trends, and recommendations documented and shared with relevant stakeholders

Job Requirements
Minimum Qualification and Experience:
· Advanced university degree in statistics, data science, economics, social sciences, planning development, planning, Management or Information Systems or another subject area.
· Experience demonstrating very strong information management skills in a professional context is essential for this post.
· Experience in information management technologies i.e. Excel, PowerBI, Activity Information.
· Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
· Ability to work effectively with diverse groups and individuals.
Fluencyin locallanguagesPashtoandDariis mandatory

Submission Guidelines
To apply: Please send your CV & Covering letter to below email address and include position title in the subject line of the application. Applications without specific subject line will not be given consideration.
Application Submission Email: mahmadzai@oxuscorp.com

details.Functional Area: Management, Planning, Business Economics, Statistics, Management Information System, Data Science, Social Science

expiring_soon.title: Digital Banking General Manager
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking General Manager is responsible for properly managing and maintaining efficient ATM services and operations. This individual will be held accountable for the administration of quality services.
Network marketing and advertising are a crucial factor in improving ATM services. As the ADC Manager, you will work closely with vendors and management, in regards to appropriate ATM placement.

Duties and Responsibilities
The Digital Banking General Manager will be able to reflect back on their experience, to provide valuable insight and make informed decisions regarding how the organization could plan and achieve benchmark goals and objectives. This individual should possess a number of very important leadership qualities, as they are in charge of directing the work of fellow employees. They should be able to effectively communicate with employees and top management.
Provision of assessment allows the ATM Manger to determine the organizations current and future needs, regarding the operation of ATM services. The ADC Manager will be highly effective in recommending certain changes and is a critical component in implementing all new operational or service related processes. New approaches will be monitored and evaluated, and results will be communicated to top management.
The ADC Manager establishes a set of goals for the department and the organization. The ADC Manager sets goals that help contribute to the organization’s growth, by implementing and enforcing strategies that aim to optimize organizational operations and services. Operational services include support for debit and credit card production, deposits and withdrawals, retail business banking.
Preparation of written proposals and performance of cost benefit analysis, as well as risk analysis in conjunction with the organizations current policies and procedures, is the responsibility of the ADC Manager. This individual will negotiate pricing of certain products and services, in order to increase the amount of revenue generated from ATM related products and services, thereby contributing to the maximization of the organizations profitability. Effective strategies and techniques that work will be recommended accordingly.
The ADC Manager is responsible for administering the Bank’s Automated Teller Machine (ATM) products, operational systems, and services. The ADC Manager will provide oversight regarding the handling and managing of the ATM’s electronic fund transfer. This individual will assist customers with all ATM related issues including, but not limited to, account related problems and fraudulent transactions.
All issues will be handled in accordance with guidelines. The ADC Manager is also responsible for evaluating the daily performance of the ATM’s operational services and recommending upgrades and maintenance accordingly.

Job Requirements
The successful candidate will be a driven energetic individual with a positive can do attitude and will come with a good track record within the cash businesses.
With a good knowledge of operational and services issues and relevant experience, the candidate will have the ability to develop, manage and invest in his team. The candidate will plan, direct, manage and oversee all aspects of the ATM operation and services including technical and operational.
Must have excellent knowledge of the industry and have a sound understanding of the leading technology, operations and business partners needed to run ATM operations successfully.
The candidate will support and achieve financial objective of the business in coordination with the Cash/vault Services Manager and keep operations within budget.
Setting key performance measures for the team for monitoring the performance of ADC department.
Educated to Bachelor Degree or MBA level will be an advantage.
An educational qualification in ATM engineering or business related degree.
Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a similar role within the Cash business
Autonomous and results orientated, with a clear determination to succeed.
Excellent communication (written and verbal), interpersonal and negotiation skills.
Capable of working effectively and productively with senior team members.
Ability to maintain strong ethical and professional values.
Excellent command of written and spoken English and local languages
The ability to operate in diverse cultural environments.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
Email / Application Form: https://jobs.bma.com.af

expiring_soon.title: Digital Marketing Manager & Graphic Designer
expiring_soon.description:
About Kabul Gate Group
Kabul Gate Group is a dynamic and diversified business group operating across multiple industries, including Real Estate & Property Development, Umrah & Travel Services, and Technology Solutions. With a strong commitment to quality, innovation, and customer satisfaction, we deliver trusted services that meet the evolving needs of our clients.
Our group brings together expertise from different sectors under one unified brand, enabling us to create value, drive growth, and build lasting relationships with our customers and partners. As we continue to expand our businesses and strengthen our market presence, we are committed to investing in talented professionals who can contribute to our vision and help elevate our brands across the digital and traditional landscape.

Job Descriptions
About the Role
We are looking for a creative and proactive Marketing & Brand Executive to manage and grow our online presence across multiple business sectors. This role combines marketing strategy, content creation, and graphic design to ensure consistent and engaging brand communication.
Duties and Responsibilities
Develop and execute marketing campaigns to increase brand awareness and engagement.
Create and manage content for social media, websites, and digital platforms.
Design graphics, promotional materials, and marketing assets.
Plan and schedule content calendars and campaign activities.
Maintain a consistent brand image across all channels.
Monitor campaign performance and provide improvement recommendations.
Stay updated on marketing trends and competitor activities.
Respond to online inquiries and engage with customers professionally.
Collaborate with internal teams to support business growth and marketing objectives.
Assist with copywriting, content creation, and promotional activities.
Requirements
Experience in digital marketing, social media management, and branding.
Strong graphic design skills using Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, or similar tools.
Excellent communication and content creation abilities.
Strong organizational skills and ability to manage multiple projects.
Creative, self-motivated, and results-driven.
A professional portfolio

Job Requirements
Education & Experience:
Bachelor's degree in Graphic Design, Marketing, Communications, Media, or a related field is preferred.
Minimum 3-4 years of experience in graphic design, social media management, and digital marketing.
Computer Skills:
Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, Canva, and other design tools.
Good knowledge of MS Word, Excel, PowerPoint, and internet applications.
Language:
Excellent writing and speaking skills in Dari, and English are required.
Skills:
Creative design and visual communication skills.
Self-motivated with the ability to manage multiple projects and deadlines.
Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.
Attention to detail and branding consistency.
Strong communication and reporting skills.
Social media content planning and management.
Ability:
Ability to work closely, professionally, and constructively with all others.
Strong understanding of social media platforms, digital marketing trends, and audience engagement.
Must possess a positive attitude, excellent interpersonal skills, and a creative mindset.
Ability to work under pressure and deliver high-quality designs within deadlines.
Ability to create engaging visual content for marketing campaigns and social media platforms.
Ability to analyze social media performance and provide recommendations for improvement.
Ability to create creative concepts, marketing campaigns, and visual storytelling strategies that strengthen brand awareness and customer engagement.
Ability to coordinate with different departments and understand business objectives.

Submission Guidelines
Please send your CV along with your portfolio to info@kabulgategroup.com with the subject line:
Graphic Designer & Social Media Manager – Vacancy #KGG-2026-001
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for an interview.
Please rename your CV file with your full name before submitting.
Email / Application Form: info@kabulgategroup.com

Submission Email
info@kabulgategroup.com
Apply

details.Contract Duration: 1 year with the possibility of extension

expiring_soon.title: Digital Marketing & Graphic Designer
expiring_soon.description:
Role Summary
The Graphic Designer will work under the direction of the Department Head and will be responsible for the following:

Duties and Responsibilities
Leading the design process for visual communication, including web and mobile applications, digital marketing materials, and other graphic design projects.
Creating visually compelling designs that ensure seamless user experiences (UX) and engaging user interfaces (UI).
Developing wireframes, prototypes, and design specifications for digital and print-based projects.
Designing marketing materials such as social media creatives, banners, flyers, brochures, and promotional graphics.
Collaborating with cross-functional teams (marketing, product management, and developers) to ensure design solutions meet both user needs and business goals.
Ensuring brand consistency across all visuals and user interface elements across digital touchpoints and marketing materials.
Conducting user research and usability testing to improve design decisions and optimize user experiences.
Staying updated with industry trends related to UX/UI design best practices, emerging technologies, and graphic design tools.
Impact of Results
Strengthening PARSA Technologies’ digital presence through user-centric designs and high-quality graphic content.
Improving user satisfaction and engagement by providing intuitive, functional, and aesthetically pleasing digital experiences.
Contributing to the company's ongoing success by driving design innovation in digital products and visual communication.

Job Requirements
Requirements:
Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Software Engineering or Equivalent Subject
3+ years of experience in field operations, fintech, telecom
Strong communication and negotiation skills
Ability to work in field and travel frequently
Result-oriented with strong execution capability
Key Skills:
Advanced proficiency in design tools such as Figma, Adobe XD, Sketch, Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, and other graphic design tools.
A strong understanding of UX/UI design principles, usability, accessibility best practices, and graphic design fundamentals.
Expertise in creating wireframes, prototypes, and detailed design documentation.
Strong creative skills in graphic design for various digital media, including marketing and promotional materials.
Excellent communication and collaboration skills, with the ability to work effectively in cross-functional teams.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who meet the above requirements are invited to submit the following documents:
Updated CV
Cover Letter • Applications must be sent to: hr@naqdpay.af
Please clearly mention the Position Title and Vacancy Number (e.g., Digital Marketing & Graphic Designer – NP#0006) in the subject line of the email. Applications without a proper subject line may not be considered.
Application Deadline: two weeks after announcement
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further assessment.
The Company reserves the right to accept or reject any application without prior notice.
For any further information, you can contact +93728979703

expiring_soon.title: HMIS/Data Management officer
expiring_soon.description:
About AADA
The Agency for Assistance and Development of Afghanistan (AADA) is an Afghan non-profit, non-governmental organization dedicated to the development of Afghanistan. Our core activities include (1) provision of quality health services; (2) community development; (3) training and capacity building at professional and community levels; and (4) research in public health and social sciences.
Agency for Assistance and Development of Afghanistan (AADA) has a Zero-tolerance Policy against sexual exploitation and abuse; therefore, all project staff will be subjected to background and security checks. AADA is also against all forms of gender-based violence, exploitation, and abuse of children in the context of our operation in the country. AADA is committed to the “Do No Harm” principle in our workplace and throughout our operation in the country therefore, our staff must also respect the organizational Safeguarding, PSEA and Code of Conduct Policy. Agency for Assistance and Development of Afghanistan (AADA) provides equal employment opportunities and does not ask for money or gifts at any stage of the recruitment process.

Job Descriptions
The HMIS / Data Management Officer will ensure the quality, completeness, timeliness, and use of health and program data by strengthening HMIS processes, supporting health facilities and outreach teams, and contributing to evidence-based decision-making.
Key Responsibilities:
Support implementation of the national HMIS in supported health facilities and community programs.
Ensure proper use of HMIS tools, registers, reporting formats, and databases.
Provide on-the-job support and guidance to health facility staff and outreach teams on HMIS procedures.
Collect, compile, and verify routine health and program data from health facilities and outreach activities.
Conduct regular data quality checks to ensure accuracy, completeness, consistency, and timeliness.
Enter data into electronic databases (e.g., DHIS2, Excel, or organizational systems) accurately and on time.
Maintain organized and secure data files, both electronic and hard copy.
Analyze data to identify trends, gaps, and performance issues.
Ensure confidentiality, data protection, and ethical use of health information.

Job Requirements
Afghan National
MD degree, preferably with post graduate degree (MPH) certified by relevant higher education authority in Afghanistan or other country;
At least 2 years’ full-time experience in managing of health projects; and robust knowledge of BPHS.
Strong communication skills, with reasonable written and spoken English;
Having ability in project designing and developing proposal;
Fluency in written and spoken local languages;
Knowledge of local environment;
Strong leadership skills and a supportive management style.

Submission Guidelines
Interested eligible individuals are invited to fill out our applications form through the link below:
https://ims.aada.af/public-position-view/MTYw
Not: Only short-listed candidates will be invited for tests and interviews. for more details communicate with us via below contact number: 0785969600

Submission Email
https://ims.aada.af/public-position-view/MTYw
Apply

details.Experience: At least 2 years’ full-time experience in managing of health projects; and robust knowledge of BPHS
details.Education: MD degree, preferably with post graduate degree (MPH) certified by relevant higher education authority in Afghanistan or other country
details.Years of Experience: At least 2 years’ full-time experience in managing of health projects; and robust knowledge of BPHS

expiring_soon.title: IT & Western Union Assistant for Sar-e-Pol (Re Announced)
expiring_soon.description:
About Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA)
Bank-e-Millie Afghan (BMA) is the foremost first financial institution of Afghanistan established in 1933. Similarly, it was the first financial institution established in a public-private partnership set up with a 72% share held by the private sector. As the first bank in the country, BMA introduced formal banking services to the people and government of Afghanistan. Since then, the bank’s competitive strength and ongoing market leadership philosophy lays in its strong capital base and proven trustworthiness. In 1976, it was fully nationalized by the government of Afghanistan. Since its establishment, BMA has been a leading bank in providing modern and secure banking services. Securing depositors' funds is the top priority of the bank. At the same time, the bank is contributing considerably to the development of manufacturing, agriculture, services, and international trade in the country. BMA is operating based on strong corporate governance principles, financial risk management, and strict compliance to keep its credibility and trust. At present, BMA has 17 City Branches including the HQ and 4 Counters in Kabul, 22 Provincial Branches and 3 Counters accompanied by a broader outlook and prospect for growth and expansion in near future, and equity investments in the USA and England.

Job Descriptions
The Branch IT + Western Union (WU) Assistant is responsible for providing technical support and assistance with IT systems in the branch, ensuring the efficient operation of banking technology. Additionally, this role encompasses managing Western Union transactions and services, providing exceptional customer service, and ensuring compliance with relevant policies and procedures.
Key Duties and Responsibilities:
IT Support
Technical Assistance
Provide day-to-day technical support for all banking software and hardware used within the branch.
Troubleshoot and resolve hardware and software issues, ensuring minimal disruption to branch operations.
Branch IT related Items Maintenance
Assist in the maintenance and updating of branch IT systems, including computers, networks, and hardware’s.
Ensure that all IT equipment is functioning properly and coordinate with external vendors for repairs as needed.
Provide services to branch all IT items at least twice in a month
User Training
Train branch staff on the use of banking software, equipment, and IT best practices to enhance their operational efficiency.
Develop user guides and training materials for specific IT processes as required.
Data Security
Assist in monitoring and implementing security measures to protect branch IT systems and customer data.
Ensure compliance with data protection policies and procedures.
Reporting
Maintain accurate records of service requests and IT incidents, providing reports to the Branch Manager and IT Department as needed.
WU (Western Union) Operations
Transaction Processing
Manage and process Western Union transactions including Send and receive, ensuring that all transactions comply with WU policy and procedure.
Assist customers with inquiries related to Western Union services, providing accurate information and resolving any issues that arise.
Customer Service
Provide exceptional customer service to clients utilizing Western Union services, ensuring a positive customer experience.
Compliance and Reconciliations
Process all WU transactions as per AML/CFT policy.
Conduct daily basis reconciliation during end of the day.
Prepare and submit reports related to Western Union activities to the Branch Manager.
Compliance
Adhere to all regulatory and compliance requirements related to customer service and banking operations.
Assist with CSO of the branch in daily branch activities.
Punctuality. (Follow official working time schedule properly).
Behave in a professional way with all the colleagues and customers of the branch.
Any other task assigned by Line Manager or will be assigned other duties and responsibilities as may be required to meet the goals and objectives of the bank.

Job Requirements
Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
Experience: 2 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
Skills and Competencies:
Strong technical skills with proficiency in computer systems, networking, and common software applications.
Excellent problem-solving skills and the ability to troubleshoot technical issues effectively.
Good communication and interpersonal skills, with a strong focus on customer service.
Ability to work collaboratively within a team and manage multiple tasks effectively.
Attention to detail and strong organizational skills.
Fluency in Dari, Pashto, and English is required.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.

Submission Email
https://jobs.bma.com.af
Apply

details.Experience: 2 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.
details.Education: Bachelor’s degree in BCS and master’s degree is preferred.
details.Years of Experience: 2 years of experience and previous experience in IT support within a banking or financial services environment is a plus.

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking General Manager
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking General Manager is responsible for properly managing and maintaining efficient ATM services and operations. This individual will be held accountable for the administration of quality services.
Network marketing and advertising are a crucial factor in improving ATM services. As the ADC Manager, you will work closely with vendors and management, in regards to appropriate ATM placement.

Duties and Responsibilities
The Digital Banking General Manager will be able to reflect back on their experience, to provide valuable insight and make informed decisions regarding how the organization could plan and achieve benchmark goals and objectives. This individual should possess a number of very important leadership qualities, as they are in charge of directing the work of fellow employees. They should be able to effectively communicate with employees and top management.
Provision of assessment allows the ATM Manger to determine the organizations current and future needs, regarding the operation of ATM services. The ADC Manager will be highly effective in recommending certain changes and is a critical component in implementing all new operational or service related processes. New approaches will be monitored and evaluated, and results will be communicated to top management.
The ADC Manager establishes a set of goals for the department and the organization. The ADC Manager sets goals that help contribute to the organization’s growth, by implementing and enforcing strategies that aim to optimize organizational operations and services. Operational services include support for debit and credit card production, deposits and withdrawals, retail business banking.
Preparation of written proposals and performance of cost benefit analysis, as well as risk analysis in conjunction with the organizations current policies and procedures, is the responsibility of the ADC Manager. This individual will negotiate pricing of certain products and services, in order to increase the amount of revenue generated from ATM related products and services, thereby contributing to the maximization of the organizations profitability. Effective strategies and techniques that work will be recommended accordingly.
The ADC Manager is responsible for administering the Bank’s Automated Teller Machine (ATM) products, operational systems, and services. The ADC Manager will provide oversight regarding the handling and managing of the ATM’s electronic fund transfer. This individual will assist customers with all ATM related issues including, but not limited to, account related problems and fraudulent transactions.
All issues will be handled in accordance with guidelines. The ADC Manager is also responsible for evaluating the daily performance of the ATM’s operational services and recommending upgrades and maintenance accordingly.

Job Requirements
The successful candidate will be a driven energetic individual with a positive can do attitude and will come with a good track record within the cash businesses.
With a good knowledge of operational and services issues and relevant experience, the candidate will have the ability to develop, manage and invest in his team. The candidate will plan, direct, manage and oversee all aspects of the ATM operation and services including technical and operational.
Must have excellent knowledge of the industry and have a sound understanding of the leading technology, operations and business partners needed to run ATM operations successfully.
The candidate will support and achieve financial objective of the business in coordination with the Cash/vault Services Manager and keep operations within budget.
Setting key performance measures for the team for monitoring the performance of ADC department.
Educated to Bachelor Degree or MBA level will be an advantage.
An educational qualification in ATM engineering or business related degree.
Minimum 3-4 years of experience in a similar role within the Cash business
Autonomous and results orientated, with a clear determination to succeed.
Excellent communication (written and verbal), interpersonal and negotiation skills.
Capable of working effectively and productively with senior team members.
Ability to maintain strong ethical and professional values.
Excellent command of written and spoken English and local languages
The ability to operate in diverse cultural environments.

Submission Guidelines
Qualified and interested applicants are encouraged to apply online through the BMA Job Portal at https://jobs.bma.com.af before the closing date.
Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for further process.
Email / Application Form: https://jobs.bma.com.af

tech_banking_jobs.title: Permanent Lecturer
tech_banking_jobs.category: IT - Software, Management, Accounting/Finance, Information Technology, Project Management, Software Development, Business Administration, Management Information System, Digital Marketing
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
استاد کادر دایمی مسؤولیت تدریس مضامین مربوط به رشته تخصصی خویش، تهیه پلان درسی، ارزیابی فعالیت‌های علمی و آموزشی محصلان، سهم‌گیری در امور اکادمیک پوهنحی و ارتقای کیفیت تدریس را به عهده دارد. موصوف مکلف است مطابق نصاب تحصیلی منظورشده، لکچرها، امتحانات، کارهای عملی و فعالیت‌های تحقیقی را تنظیم و تطبیق نماید. همچنان استاد کادر دایمی در برنامه‌های علمی، سیمینارها، تحقیق، راهنمایی محصلان، انکشاف نصاب و سایر امور محوله از طرف پوهنحی و پوهنتون همکاری فعال می‌نماید.

Duties and Responsibilities
استاد کادر دایمی یکی از اعضای مهم اکادمیک پوهنتون بوده و مسؤولیت دارد تا در بخش‌های تدریس، تحقیق، ارتقای کیفیت، راهنمایی محصلان و تطبیق برنامه‌های علمی و اکادمیک مطابق لوایح و مقررات وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پالیسی‌های پوهنتون ایفای وظیفه نماید. وظایف و مسؤولیت‌های عمده استاد کادر دایمی قرار ذیل می‌باشد :
تدریس مضامین مربوط به رشته تخصصی خویش مطابق نصاب تحصیلی منظورشده و پلان درسی پوهنتون .
تهیه و ترتیب پلان درسی، لکچر نوت، مواد آموزشی، منابع درسی و سایر وسایل کمک‌آموزشی جهت بهبود روند تدریس .
استفاده از میتودهای معیاری، مؤثر و نوین تدریس به منظور بلند بردن سطح فهم، مهارت و مشارکت محصلان در صنف .
ارزیابی منظم محصلان از طریق امتحانات وسط سمستر و نهایی، کارخانگی، پریزنتیشن، پروژه‌های تحقیقی، فعالیت‌های صنفی و سایر روش‌های اکادمیک .
تهیه سوالات امتحانی مطابق معیارهای علمی، اخذ امتحانات، تصحیح پارچه‌ها، ثبت نمرات و ارائه نتایج محصلان در زمان معین .
راهنمایی علمی و اکادمیک محصلان در زمینه درس، تحقیق، مونوگراف، پروژه‌های علمی و سایر فعالیت‌های آموزشی .
سهم‌گیری فعال در امور تضمین کیفیت، تطبیق معیارهای اکادمیک، تهیه اسناد مورد نیاز، گزارش‌دهی و همکاری در پروسه‌های ارزیابی داخلی و خارجی پوهنتون .
همکاری نزدیک و دوامدار با رئیس پوهنحی و آمر دیپارتمنت در تطبیق پلان‌های درسی، برنامه‌های اکادمیک، امور تدریسی، تحقیقاتی و اداری مربوط به دیپارتمنت و پوهنحی .
اشتراک فعال در جلسات دیپارتمنت، پوهنحی، کمیته‌های علمی، کمیته تضمین کیفیت و سایر کمیته‌های مربوطه پوهنتون .
سهم‌گیری در انکشاف، بازنگری و بهبود نصاب تحصیلی، کورس پالیسی‌ها، پلان‌های درسی و مواد آموزشی مطابق نیازهای علمی و بازار کار .
انجام فعالیت‌های تحقیقی، نوشتن مقالات علمی، تهیه آثار اکادمیک و اشتراک در سیمینارها، ورکشاپ‌ها، کنفرانس‌ها و برنامه‌های علمی .
همکاری در برگزاری برنامه‌های علمی، سیمینارها، ورکشاپ‌ها، کنفرانس‌ها، نمایشگاه‌های علمی و سایر فعالیت‌های اکادمیک پوهنتون .
رعایت نظم، حاضری منظم، اوقات کاری، اصول تدریس و رفتار مسلکی در محیط اکادمیک .
ایجاد فضای سالم، محترمانه و علمی در صنف و تشویق محصلان به تحقیق، مطالعه، خلاقیت و تفکر انتقادی .
تهیه گزارش‌های علمی، تدریسی، تحقیقی و اکادمیک طبق نیاز دیپارتمنت، پوهنحی و اداره پوهنتون .
همکاری در جمع‌آوری، ترتیب و نگهداری اسناد اکادمیک مربوط به مضامین، پلان‌های درسی، حاضری محصلان، نمرات و سایر اسناد مورد نیاز .
رعایت اصول، لوایح، طرزالعمل‌ها، مقررات و رهنمودهای وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پوهنتون .
اجرای سایر وظایف مرتبط که از طرف آمر دیپارتمنت، رئیس پوهنحی و رهبری پوهنتون به وی سپرده می‌شود .

Job Requirements
متقاضی بست استاد کادر دایمی باید واجد شرایط ذیل باشد:
داشتن حداقل سند تحصیلی ماستری در رشته مربوطه؛ سند دکتورا مزیت محسوب می‌گردد .
داشتن تجربه تدریس در نهادهای دولتی و خصوصی .
توانایی تدریس مضامین مسلکی مطابق نصاب تحصیلی و پلان درسی .
توانایی تهیه مواد درسی، سوالات امتحانی و ارزیابی محصلان .
داشتن توانایی تحقیق، مقاله‌نویسی و راهنمایی علمی محصلان .
آشنایی با پروسه‌های تضمین کیفیت و همکاری در امور اکادمیک .
داشتن مهارت‌های خوب ارتباطی، کار تیمی و رفتار مسلکی .
آشنایی با کمپیوتر و زبان‌های رسمی کشور؛ دانستن زبان انگلیسی مزیت است .
رعایت لوایح وزارت تحصیلات عالی و پالیسی‌های پوهنتون .

Submission Guidelines
علاقه‌مندان واجد شرایط می‌توانند درخواست خویش را همراه با خلص سوانح، کاپی اسناد تحصیلی، تذکره/کارت هویت و سایر اسناد مرتبط، الی تاریخ تعیین‌شده از طریق ایمیل یا به‌صورت حضوری به بخش منابع بشری پوهنتون ارسال نمایند.
در عنوان ایمیل باید نام بست و Vacancy no را به‌گونه واضح ذکر گردد. تنها با نامزدان واجد شرایط تماس گرفته خواهد شد.
برای معلومات بیشتر:
https://mohe.gov.af/ps-AF/Vacancy-card/vacancy-613
https://mohe.gov.af/fa-AF/Vacancy-card/vacancy-614

details.Functional Area: IT - Software, Management, Accounting/Finance, Information Technology, Project Management, Software Development, Business Administration, Management Information System, Digital Marketing

tech_banking_jobs.title: IT Help-desk Representative
tech_banking_jobs.salary: As per organization salary policy per month
tech_banking_jobs.description:
About New Kabul Bank
New Kabul Bank started its banking activities on 18 April 2011 by having received its license as a commercial bank under banking system of the country. Ministry of Finance is the shareholder of New Kabul Bank.
New Kabul Bank is operating by CBS system and providing services for valued citizens by covering a wide network with professional and experienced cadre.

Job Descriptions
Job Description: (شرح وظیفه)
Provide end user support for all Information Technology products and services. Support includes software and hardware installation at end user level, providing network connectivity, OS and software update, answering questions, troubleshooting problems, teaching or instructing end users at HQ or branches regarding software or hardware functionality.
Enforce IT Department policies and procedures and ensures compliance with IT Department policy.
Determines the most effective manner to resolve client's technical issue. Engages in research and in-depth troubleshooting to resolve technical issues.
Provides remote support to end-users computers to troubleshoot, diagnose and resolve complex issues. While providing remote support, the Helpdesk Technician should record the session through screen recording application and store the recording in safe place for compliance and investigation related issue.
Records Issues / problems details in Helpdesk Ticketing System. Updates tickets with appropriate journal entries of activities, and closes tickets with resolution entered upon completion of the job.
Proper maintenance of documentation for the technical tasks performed for end users.
Visits NKB branches at Kabul Zone to ensure the computing devices are operational as per need.
Knowledge sharing and training of fellow team members.
Submits weekly work reports to immediate supervisor.
Can be officially assigned to Monthly Procurement team and control as per need.
Any other task assigned by direct supervisor.

Job Requirements
EDUCATION ( تحصیلات) : Bachelor Degree in Information Technology/ Computer Science / Information System.
EXPERIENCE ( تجارب): work of experience in related field is preferred.
SKILLS ( مهارت): Troubleshooting and problem solving skills. Good interpersonal and communication skills and the ability to work with frontline and senior staff.
WORKING RELATIONSHIPS: Works with other team members, including system administrators, network engineers, and core banking team.
ADDITIONAL REQUIREMENTS: On call availability

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates are requested to send their applications along with copies of their CV and educational and work certificates to the hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af All candidates short-listed for interviews will be directly contacted.
Kindly copy the vacancy number and past it in your e-mail subject line with the position title, otherwise you won’t be short listed.

Submission Email
hrd.cv@newkabulbank.af
Apply

details.Salary: As per organization salary policy per month

tech_banking_jobs.title: Digital Banking Technical Officer - ATM & POS
tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
The Digital Banking Technical Officer – ATM & POS is primarily responsible for the end-to-end support, maintenance, and troubleshooting of Afghan United Bank’s ATM and POS infrastructure. This includes managing hardware and software operations, ensuring uptime and functionality, and coordinating with vendors for deployment, upgrades, and issue resolution. The role is vital to maintaining the reliability and effectiveness of self-service and point-of-sale banking services.

Duties and Responsibilities
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Resolve difficult situations and malfunction of ATMs/POS effectively by analyzing the situation and identifying potential solutions and ensuring a high level of customer satisfaction.
· Oversee technical testing and implementation of ATMs and POS.
· Maintain of all communicational and networking issues related to ATM/POS
· Mobile Money
· Provide first-level technical support for ATMs, POS terminals, Mobile Banking, Internet Banking, and E-Commerce Gateway services.
· Monitor ATM and card switch systems (AfPay, MasterCard, Visa) to ensure continuous service availability and timely issue resolution.
· Coordinate with the switch vendor and third-party service providers for system upgrades, configurations, and incident management.
· Support onboarding and technical setup of POS merchants and E-Commerce merchants, including configuration and testing.
· Assist in testing and implementation of new digital banking features, services, and systems.
· Maintain accurate logs and documentation of technical activities, incidents, and changes.
· Ensure timely follow-up and escalation of unresolved issues to appropriate teams or vendors.
· Collaborate with internal departments to resolve customer-facing technical issues and contribute to service improvement.
· Adhere to internal IT, cybersecurity, and compliance standards for all supported platforms.
Participate in business continuity and contingency support processes for digital systems.

Job Requirements
Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Electronics, or a related technical field.
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience in ATM and/or POS maintenance and support, preferably in a banking or financial environment.
Strong knowledge of ATM and POS hardware components, software configurations, and troubleshooting.
Familiarity with ATM switch systems and integration protocols.
Understanding of network connectivity and remote management tools.
Ability to manage vendor coordination and service level monitoring.

Submission Guidelines
Interested candidates who deem themselves suitable for this vacancy can share their complete profile including (application letter, updated CV, and recent photo) electronically to below mentioned email and please indicate the vacancy number (AUB/EA/VA/026-029) in the subject line of your email otherwise your application will not be considered.
Only shortlisted candidates who have completed the requirements of the vacancy will be called for further selection process.

tech_banking_jobs.description:
Role Summary
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.
Requires quick work execution, competent English skills, honesty and reliability, and extensive knowledge or connections in Baghlan Province.

Duties and Responsibilities
Conducting field research in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan, or writing research reports on Afghanistan-related topics.

Job Requirements
Residing in Baghlan Province, Afghanistan; possessing basic English writing and communication skills; preference will be given to candidates with relevant government, military, or investigator experience; male candidates preferred

Submission Guidelines
Please submit your English resume on this website. Name your resume with your name and occupation. The resume should include your phone number, education, and detailed work experience (specifying position, company name, and responsibilities). Please update your resume regularly. Company staff will contact you via email; please check your inbox.
